data.content:
### Define AuthenticationException Class in Python

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v2.1.0/exceptions/page.mdx

Defines an exception for authentication failures. This class inherits directly from Python's base Exception class, as it represents a broader authentication issue rather than a sandbox-specific one.

```python
class AuthenticationException(Exception)

```

--------------------------------

### TypeScript: AuthenticationError Constructor

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.0.5/errors/page.mdx

Represents an error that occurs when authentication fails. It accepts a message of any type.

```typescript
new AuthenticationError(message: any): AuthenticationError
```

--------------------------------

### Configure API Key for Authentication

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.13.0/sandbox/page.mdx

Set the E2B API key for authentication purposes. If not provided, it defaults to the E2B_API_KEY environment variable.

```typescript
optional apiKey: string;

// E2B API key to use for authentication.
// Default: E2B_API_KEY // environment variable
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationException in Python

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v2.1.1/exceptions/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationException for handling errors that occur during the authentication process, indicating a failure to verify user or system identity.

```python
class AuthenticationException(Exception):
    pass
```

--------------------------------

### Secure Traffic Option in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.9.1/sandbox/page.mdx

Determines whether to secure all traffic coming to the sandbox controller with an authentication token. Defaults to false.

```typescript
optional secure: boolean;

// Default
false
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationException in Python

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.0.3/exceptions/page.mdx

Indicates that an authentication attempt failed, preventing access to sandbox resources or functionalities. This exception inherits from the base SandboxException.

```python
class AuthenticationException(SandboxException)

```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox Authentication API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v1.7.1/sandbox/page.mdx

This section covers the methods available for interacting with the E2B Sandbox, including input simulation and asynchronous operations.

```APIDOC
## POST /e2b/sandbox/scroll

### Description
Scroll the mouse wheel by the given amount in a specified direction.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/e2b/sandbox/scroll

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **direction** (string) - Required - The direction to scroll. Can be "up" or "down".
- **amount** (number) - Optional - The amount to scroll. Defaults to 1.

### Request Body
```json
{
  "direction": "down" | "up",
  "amount": 1
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **void** (void) - Indicates the scroll operation completed successfully.

#### Response Example
```json
{}
```
```

```APIDOC
## POST /e2b/sandbox/wait

### Description
Wait for a specified duration in milliseconds.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/e2b/sandbox/wait

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **ms** (number) - Required - The amount of time to wait in milliseconds.

### Request Body
```json
{
  "ms": 1000
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **void** (void) - Indicates the wait operation completed successfully.

#### Response Example
```json
{}
```
```

```APIDOC
## POST /e2b/sandbox/waitAndVerify

### Description
Wait for a command to return a specific result within a given timeout period.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/e2b/sandbox/waitAndVerify

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **cmd** (string) - Required - The command to run.
- **onResult** (function) - Required - A function that checks the command's result and returns a boolean.
- **timeout** (number) - Optional - The maximum time to wait for the command to return the result. Defaults to 10 seconds.
- **interval** (number) - Optional - The interval in seconds between checks. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

### Request Body
```json
{
  "cmd": "ls -l",
  "onResult": "(result) => result.includes('myfile.txt')",
  "timeout": 10,
  "interval": 0.5
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **boolean** (boolean) - `true` if the command returned the result within the timeout, otherwise `false`.

#### Response Example
```json
true
```
```

```APIDOC
## POST /e2b/sandbox/write

### Description
Write the given text at the current cursor position in the sandbox.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/e2b/sandbox/write

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **text** (string) - Required - The text to write.
- **options** (object) - Optional - An object containing chunk size and delay between chunks.
  - **chunkSize** (number) - Optional - The size of each text chunk. Defaults to 25.
  - **delayInMs** (number) - Optional - The delay in milliseconds between each chunk. Defaults to 75.

### Request Body
```json
{
  "text": "Hello, E2B!",
  "options": {
    "chunkSize": 25,
    "delayInMs": 75
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **void** (void) - Indicates the write operation completed successfully.

#### Response Example
```json
{}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationError in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.1.0/errors/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationError class, thrown when authentication fails. It accepts a message parameter during instantiation.

```ts
class AuthenticationError {
  constructor(message: any)
}
```

--------------------------------

### E2B API Key Configuration

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.11.0/sandbox/page.mdx

Configures the E2B API key for authentication. It can be set directly or defaulted to the E2B_API_KEY environment variable.

```typescript
optional apiKey: string;
```

--------------------------------

### TypeScript: Define AuthenticationError

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.9.0/errors/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationError class, thrown when authentication fails. It accepts a message of any type in its constructor.

```typescript
class AuthenticationError {
  constructor(message: any) {
    // ... implementation
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationError Class (TypeScript)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.13.0/errors/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationError class, which is thrown when authentication fails. It accepts a message parameter during instantiation.

```typescript
class AuthenticationError {
  message: any;
  constructor(message: any) {
    this.message = message;
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Enable Secure Traffic with Auth Token

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.13.0/sandbox/page.mdx

When enabled, this option secures all traffic coming to the sandbox controller with an authentication token. The default value is false.

```typescript
optional secure: boolean;

// Secure all traffic coming to the sandbox controller with auth token
// Default: false
```

--------------------------------

### Configure Docker Daemon for Insecure Registries (JSON)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/troubleshooting/templates/build-authentication-error/page.mdx

This configuration snippet allows Docker to send requests to a local proxy, which handles authentication. It is intended to be added to the Docker daemon's JSON configuration file.

```json
{
  "insecure-registries": ["host.docker.internal:49984"]
}
```

```json
{
  "builder": {
    "gc": {
      "defaultKeepStorage": "20GB",
      "enabled": true
    }
  },
  "features": {
    "buildkit": true
  },
  "insecure-registries": [
    "host.docker.internal:49984"
  ]
}
```

```json
{
  "insecure-registries": ["localhost:49984"]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationError in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.5.0/errors/page.mdx

Thrown when authentication fails. This error class is part of the E2B SDK's error hierarchy.

```typescript
class AuthenticationError {
  message: any;

  constructor(message: any) {
    this.message = message;
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationError in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.5/errors/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationError class, thrown when authentication processes fail. It accepts a message string upon instantiation.

```TypeScript
class AuthenticationError extends Error {
  constructor(message: string) {
    super(message);
    this.name = "AuthenticationError";
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### API Key Configuration

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.13.2/sandbox/page.mdx

Sets the E2B API key for authentication. This is a string option. Defaults to the E2B_API_KEY environment variable.

```typescript
optional apiKey: string;

// Default: E2B_API_KEY // environment variable
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationError Class (TypeScript)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.0.3/errors/page.mdx

Defines the AuthenticationError class, which is thrown when authentication fails. It extends the base SandboxError and accepts a message parameter.

```typescript
class AuthenticationError extends SandboxError {
  constructor(message: any) {
    super(message);
  }
}
// Defined in errors.ts:72
```

--------------------------------

### Define AuthenticationException for Sandbox Errors in Python

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.0.1/exceptions/page.mdx

Defines the 'AuthenticationException' which inherits from 'SandboxException'. This exception is raised when authentication to the sandbox environment fails, typically due to invalid credentials or permissions.

```python
class AuthenticationException(SandboxException):
    pass
```
